# Jonathan Wallace — Georgian Bay Real Estate

> Jonathan Wallace is a REALTOR and Salesperson serving Southern Georgian Bay, Ontario: Midland, Penetanguishene, Tiny Township, Tay Township, and Wasaga Beach. He offers full-service home selling built on a personal risk-free listing guarantee, premium marketing (professional staging, photography, cinematic video, 3D tours, floor plans, custom feature books), and a private network of qualified buyers who preview homes before MLS. Buyers get local representation and early access to coming-soon listings. One point of contact from first call to closing. Phone: 705-433-2525.

## Sell your home (by town)

- [Sell your home in Midland](https://jonathanwallace.ca/sell-your-home-in-midland): How Jonathan markets and sells Midland homes, with the risk-free listing promise.
- [Sell your home in Penetanguishene](https://jonathanwallace.ca/sell-your-home-in-penetanguishene): Full-service listing and marketing for Penetanguishene sellers.
- [Sell your home in Tiny Township](https://jonathanwallace.ca/sell-your-home-in-tiny-township): Selling beach, waterfront, and inland homes across Tiny Township.
- [Sell your home in Tay Township](https://jonathanwallace.ca/sell-your-home-in-tay-township): Home selling across Victoria Harbour, Port McNicoll, and Waubaushene.
- [Sell your home in Wasaga Beach](https://jonathanwallace.ca/sell-your-home-in-wasaga-beach): Marketing for Wasaga Beach cottages, riverfront homes, and new builds.
- [How selling works](https://jonathanwallace.ca/sell.html): The full selling process, systems, and marketing package.
- [Free home valuation](https://jonathanwallace.ca/home-value.html): Request a local market analysis of what your home is worth today.

## Buy a home

- [Find your home](https://jonathanwallace.ca/find-your-home): Tell Jonathan your communities, budget, and must-haves to get matched listings.
- [Buying with Jonathan](https://jonathanwallace.ca/buy.html): Buyer representation and early access to coming-soon homes.
- [Home tours](https://jonathanwallace.ca/home-tours.html): Video walkthroughs of Georgian Bay homes.

## Community guides

- [Midland real estate](https://jonathanwallace.ca/midland-real-estate/): Living in and buying/selling in Midland.
- [Penetanguishene real estate](https://jonathanwallace.ca/penetanguishene-real-estate/): The bilingual town on the bay.
- [Tiny Township real estate](https://jonathanwallace.ca/tiny-township-real-estate/): Beaches, cottages, and inland homes.
- [Tay Township real estate](https://jonathanwallace.ca/tay-township-real-estate/): Victoria Harbour, Port McNicoll, Waubaushene.
- [Wasaga Beach real estate](https://jonathanwallace.ca/wasaga-beach-real-estate/): Beach-area homes and new inland subdivisions.

- [How your home actually gets sold](https://jonathanwallace.ca/blog-how-your-home-gets-sold.html): The marketing process, step by step.
